title: Smoky Crumbly Algerian Noodles Tagine
description: A briny, crumbly, kid-friendly Algerian dish featuring noodles in a smoky braise, perfect for a weeknight dinner. Traditionally cooked in a kadhai.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large kadhai or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut 8 until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cumin seeds and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, turmeric, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the fettuccine noodles to the tagine and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover the kadhai with a lid, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the noodles are tender.
Fluff the noodle mixture with a fork and serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving, as it will thicken slightly.
